Brief

Learn about Atocha Protocol and Atocha Web App

News

  • Atocha Commemorative NFT Claim [Silver] May 29, 2023
    Kicking start the whole new Atocha Protocol 2.0 with restructured roadmap and strategy to move forward. Before we go into this exciting topic, we would like to apologize for the delayed announcement for the NFT Claim [Atocha Limited Edition Commemorati...
  • Moving Forward To 2023 — Atocha 2.0 January 18, 2023
    Moving Forward To 2023 — Atocha 2.0As we are a few days left before moving into 2023, we want to share what we have learned, how we are re-strategizing, and how we want to pivot into the new year amidst the crypto winter.Frankly, it is hard for any sta...
  • Atocha Commemorative NFT Option Claim December 29, 2022
    Atocha Commemorative NFT ClaimAs we are approaching the end of 2022, we are wrapping up and re-strategize for 2023 with the expectation of crypto winter going to be lasting for more than a year. Looking back, we have launched a series of Commemorative ...
  • Atocha Monthly Newsletter — November22 November 2, 2022
    Atocha Monthly Newsletter — November22GM Atocha Fam! We want to kickstart this monthly newsletter update for the community to get up to speed on what we have achieved last month and what’s next for this particular month. This will allow the community t...
  • Atocha Monthly Newsletter — October22 October 3, 2022
    Atocha Monthly Newsletter — October22GM Atocha Fam! We want to kickstart this monthly newsletter update for the community to get up to speed on what we have achieved last month and what’s next for this particular month. This will allow the community to have better clarity on the development and collaboration that is going on. Of course, it also ensures that we, as the core team members are always working our way towards our ultimate goal — building a global puzzle game infrastructure + community.In this monthly newsletter, there will be 3 segments:Past month’s progress and achievementCurrent month’s roadmap and goalWords from the teamPast Month Progress and AchievementNEAR2ATO Treasure Hunt for NEARCON2022 Side Event LaunchingPhysical participation on NEARCON2022 (come and say hi to us if you are around!)Partnership with Near Ecosystem through NEAR2ATO Treasure HuntLaunch of puzzle game landing page (no need of web3 wallet to interact)Social following & ATO holders update:Atocha Protocol at NEARCON2022 with NEAR Team LisbonPreparation Before NEARCON2022We decided to go for NEARCON2022 at the end of July 2022. Since then, we have made up our mind that we should organize a side event in conjunction with this grand annual event of Near ecosystem. Within a week's time, we came up with the idea of gathering 30 ...

Create & Solve

Set Up Your Account

You can set up your account via Twitter or connecting with Polkadot JS wallet.

Create Your Puzzle

Start creating your very own puzzle and challenge the community to solve it while earning Atocha Points.

Solve The Puzzle

Get competitive and solve as many puzzles as possible to earn ATO.

Up Your Rank

Accumulate your Atocha Points and rise in the weekly ranks. The top 5 are able to claim ATO every week.

Backers

Team & Community

Join Atocha community and meet our core creative team

Catching up with Stader

Join Atocha Ecosystem

We are opening up Atocha Ecosystem to Web3 community, Web2 community (including conventional businesses) where we think puzzle game should be incluive and fun! If you are looking to join us as Content Creator or Sponsor (project marketing/advertisement), you may reach out to us.

Join Us As Sponsor

Market you content with us by becominga Sponsor through Learn to Earn mechanism.

Contribute

Becoming Creator

Having ideas and creativity? Join our Creator team and experience Creator to Earn.

Sign Up

Talk To Us

Reach out to our core team members to understand more about us.

Ask Atocha

Atocha.io Copyright © 2025. All rights reserved.
We use cookies on our website to give you the most relevant experience by remembering your preferences and repeat visits. By clicking “Accept All”, you consent to the use of ALL the cookies. However, you may visit "Cookie Settings" to provide a controlled consent.
Cookie SettingsAccept All
Manage consent

Privacy Overview

This website uses cookies to improve your experience while you navigate through the website. Out of these, the cookies that are categorized as necessary are stored on your browser as they are essential for the working of basic functionalities of the website. We also use third-party cookies that help us analyze and understand how you use this website. These cookies will be stored in your browser only with your consent. You also have the option to opt-out of these cookies. But opting out of some of these cookies may affect your browsing experience.
Necessary
Always Enabled

Necessary cookies are absolutely essential for the website to function properly. These cookies ensure basic functionalities and security features of the website, anonymously.

CookieDurationDescription
cookielawinfo-checkbox-analytics11 monthsThis cookie is set by GDPR Cookie Consent plugin. The cookie is used to store the user consent for the cookies in the category "Analytics".
cookielawinfo-checkbox-functional11 monthsThe cookie is set by GDPR cookie consent to record the user consent for the cookies in the category "Functional".
cookielawinfo-checkbox-necessary11 monthsThis cookie is set by GDPR Cookie Consent plugin. The cookies is used to store the user consent for the cookies in the category "Necessary".
cookielawinfo-checkbox-others11 monthsThis cookie is set by GDPR Cookie Consent plugin. The cookie is used to store the user consent for the cookies in the category "Other.
cookielawinfo-checkbox-performance11 monthsThis cookie is set by GDPR Cookie Consent plugin. The cookie is used to store the user consent for the cookies in the category "Performance".
viewed_cookie_policy11 monthsThe cookie is set by the GDPR Cookie Consent plugin and is used to store whether or not user has consented to the use of cookies. It does not store any personal data.

Functional

Functional cookies help to perform certain functionalities like sharing the content of the website on social media platforms, collect feedbacks, and other third-party features.

Performance

Performance cookies are used to understand and analyze the key performance indexes of the website which helps in delivering a better user experience for the visitors.

Analytics

Analytical cookies are used to understand how visitors interact with the website. These cookies help provide information on metrics the number of visitors, bounce rate, traffic source, etc.

Advertisement

Advertisement cookies are used to provide visitors with relevant ads and marketing campaigns. These cookies track visitors across websites and collect information to provide customized ads.

Others

Other uncategorized cookies are those that are being analyzed and have not been classified into a category as yet.

SAVE & ACCEPT

Terms and Conditions - Privacy Policy
